task_description: Mark post locations with spray paint or stakes along fence line
notes: Mark every 8-10 ft for line posts

task_description: Dig post holes with manual clamshell digger
Dig post holes with gas or skid-steer auger
Mix and pour concrete around posts - hold plumb until set
notes: Allow 24-48 hrs to cure before tensioning fabric

task_description: Thread top rail through loop caps and connect sections
Unroll and attach fabric to terminal posts with tension bands
Secure fabric to top rail and line posts with tie wire
notes: Tie every 12in on posts and 24in on rails

task_description: Run tension wire along bottom of fence and tension
Set gate posts hang gate and adjust hinges and latch
Set gate posts hang double gate panels and adjust
Remove debris cap all posts check all ties and tension
Mark post locations - tighter spacing for commercial
equipment_needed: Measuring tape / string line / surveyor pin

task_description: Dig post holes with auger - deeper for commercial
Set heavier commercial posts in concrete
notes: Use more concrete for commercial - 2 bags min

task_description: Install commercial top rail with heavier gauge rail
Install heavier 6GA or 9GA commercial fabric
notes: Commercial fabric is heavier - use extra hands

task_description: Install 3-strand barbed wire on extension arms
notes: Wear heavy gloves - follow local municipality rules

task_description: Mark post locations with stakes
Dig holes with clamshell digger - below frost line
Dig holes with power auger
Plumb and concrete posts
Attach 2x4 rails horizontal between posts
Nail or screw individual pickets to rails
notes: Use spacer jig for consistent spacing

task_description: Hang wood gate frame with pickets on posts
notes: Brace gate diagonally to prevent sag

task_description: Apply stain or sealer to finished fence
Mark post locations - vinyl uses specific post spacing
Dig holes for vinyl posts with steel inserts
Plumb and set vinyl posts (with steel inserts)
notes: Steel insert REQUIRED for structural integrity

task_description: Slide rails and pickets into post channels
notes: Do not force - vinyl cracks in cold weather

task_description: Snap vinyl caps onto all posts
Hang vinyl gate with hinges and latch
